placeholder_items: Structural Fixings & Connectors — PLACEHOLDER (obtain from FrameCAD fixing schedule)

primary_sources.geometry: DXF (floor area, wall lm, verandah, openings)
primary_sources.structural_frame: FrameCAD BOM tabs (roof panel, truss, wall frame, battens) + IFC (SHS, verandah)
primary_sources.roof: DXF roof polygon (area, perimeter, ridge, eaves, barge)
primary_sources.openings: DXF INSERT blocks (door/window mark, width, count)
primary_sources.rooms: project_config room_schedule (no machine-readable schedule in sources)
primary_sources.stairs: project_config stair_schedule (DXF STAIRS layer = evidence only)
primary_sources.floor_system: IFC floor elements (inferred — no FrameCAD floor panel tab for this project)

known_discrepancies.truss_lm: IFC reports 1634.29 lm vs reference ~490 lm — likely IFC over-classifies purlins as trusses
known_discrepancies.batten_count: FrameCAD BOM reports 266 pieces (1385.3 lm) vs reference ~47 nr — BOM may cover all zones not just roof
known_discrepancies.shs_lm: IFC reports 96.69 lm SHS vs reference ~24.9 lm — IFC may include non-structural members

remaining_manual_review.fixing_schedule: 256+ structural fixings/connectors — requires FrameCAD connection report
remaining_manual_review.floor_panel_families: 1.8kPa and 4kPa panel types not in BOM for this project — obtain floor panel schedule
remaining_manual_review.ph_brackets: Post holder brackets (PHA/PHB/PHD) — requires connection schedule
remaining_manual_review.stair_detail: Riser count/height from project_config estimate (LOW confidence) — verify from drawings
remaining_manual_review.room_areas: Room schedule from project_config (LOW confidence) — verify from architectural drawings
remaining_manual_review.ac_mechanical: No mechanical schedule in sources — obtain from services engineer
remaining_manual_review.toilet_tiling: Inferred from room type — no finish schedule in sources
